---
id: admin-checkout-order
title: "Admin checkout order"
description: "Initiate DOKU payment checkout for an admin-created order. Returns redirect URL for customer payment."

hide_table_of_contents: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Admin checkout order"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/events/{idOrSlug}/admin/orders/{orderId}/checkout"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Initiate DOKU payment checkout for an admin-created order. Returns redirect URL for customer payment.

  as={"h2"}
